title: Essentials for Survival
description: Just the essentials for survival with your friends or alone
body:
The Pack does:
1. The Pack gives Ancient Debris a green overlay and every other ore gets an outline in its ore color

2. Marks dangerous blocks (trapped chest, powder snow, string) red so you see them                       instantly

3. Makes Netherite Armor and tools a little bit darker

4. Makes Diamond Armor and tools a little bit lighter

5. With the Texture Pack Glazed Terracota has now actually the color from its name

6. No overlay (blur) when wearing a pumpkin(doesnt work in older versions)
 
7.  Little Changes to some textures (experince bottle, fire charge, golden apple, enchanted golden apple)

8. Colors the ping indicator so bad ping=red, good ping=green usw.

9. Gives Iron Golems little red flowers 

10. Makes the shield pattern more HD

11. Lower shield when holding it in the off hand

12. Lower fire on the ground

12. Lower fire animation when burning
